notes: The app bundles a small seed dataset to keep the repository under the 10 MB hackathon limit.
Venue capacities, names, and coordinates are approximate public planning data and should be replaced with official venue feeds for production deployment.
Kaggle-style CSV or public mobility datasets can be joined through the venue id field without changing the app contract.

sources.name: FIFA World Cup 2026 official tournament hub
Wikidata
sources.usedFor: Approximate venue coordinates and public metadata

sources.name: Kaggle public datasets catalog
sources.usedFor: Optional source for future CSV joins such as weather, mobility, or venue operations data
